sections.content: Let me check what changed and find the next gray dot to click. The pattern seems to be: click a gray dot → purple square moves there → old position becomes a gray dot. I need to continue this pattern.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state - find purple square and gray dots
seg = current_frame.segmentation
purple_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'p' and n['pixels'] == 9]
gray_dots = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'G' and n['pixels'] == 1]

print("Purple squares:")
for n in purple_nodes:
    # Compute center
    rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
    cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
    center = (sum(rows)/len(rows), sum(cols)/len(cols))
    print(f"  boundary={n['boundary']} center≈{center}")

print(f"\nGray dots ({len(gray_dots)}):")
for n in gray_dots:
    print(f"  {n['boundary']}")

# Check HUD
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'W' and n['pixels'] < 100:
        print(f"\nHUD: {n['pixels']} pixels")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
